zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Strong於1670年2月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓時，她的父親Jedediah Strong31歲，母親Freedom Woodward27歲。她於1690年3月4日與Benjamin Carpenter在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1762年3月20日在美國康乃狄克州托藍德考文垂享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Strong于1670年2月3日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓时，她的父亲Jedediah Strong31岁，母亲Freedom Woodward27岁。她于1690年3月4日与Benjamin Carpenter在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1762年3月20日在美国康涅狄格州托藍德考文垂享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Strong
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English strong(e), strang(e) ‘strong, powerful’ (Old English strang).
Americanized form (translation into English) of Jewish   Stark  .

variants.name: Strang
meanings: German: topographic name from Middle High German stranc ‘strip of land’, or a habitational name from any of the places so called.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a rope maker, from Middle High German stranc, German Strang ‘cord, rope’.

variants.name: Trehan
meanings: Indian: Sikh name, from a name of a sub-caste of Khatris.

Channel Islands (Jersey): occupational name, a variant of French Trahand, from a derivative of French traire ‘to draw or stretch’, for a silk worker whose job was to draw out the thread from cocoons. In Britain it has sometimes been ‘translated’ into English as Strong .

variants.name: Trahan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Monique, Pierre, Leonce, Lucien, Alcide, Cecile, Emile, Adrien, Camille.

French: variant of Trahant or Trahand (and, in North America, an altered form of the former), a metonymic occupational name for a silkworker who drew out the thread from the cocoons, from a derivative of the verb traire ‘to draw or stretch’. Compare Strong .

History: The LA branches of the Trahan family trace their descent from Guillaume Trahan, from Montreuil-Bellay in Maine-et-Loire, who arrived in Acadia in the 17th century; he married Madeleine Brun in Port-Royal in Acadia (now Annapolis Royal in NS, Canada), c. 1666. At the time of the expulsion of the Acadians (1755–64), his numerous descendants were deported and finally settled principally in the Attakapas country of LA.

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Strong was born on 3 February 1670, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Jedediah Strong, was 31 and her mother, Freedom Woodward, was 27. She married Benjamin Carpenter on 4 March 1690, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 20 March 1762, in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Strong est née le 3 février 1670, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Jedediah Strong, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Freedom Woodward, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Carpenter le 4 mars 1690, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1762, à Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Strong am 3. Februar 1670 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jedediah Strong 31 und ihre Mutter Freedom Woodward 27. Sie hat am 4. März 1690 in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Benjamin Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1762 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Strong è nata il il 3 febbraio 1670 nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Jedediah Strong, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Freedom Woodward, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Carpenter il 4 marzo 1690, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1762, nel Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 92 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Strongが1670年2月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで生まれた時，父Jedediah Strongは31歳，母Freedom Woodwardは27歳であった。1690年3月4日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンでBenjamin Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1762年3月20日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコベントリーで92歳で死去した。

ko.Rehoboth, Bristol, Province of Massachus: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스
ko.Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스 프로비데스
ko.Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴
ko.Coventry, Hartford, Connecticut, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 커븐트리
ko.Coventry, Windham, Connecticut Colony, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 커븐트리
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Strong(이)가 1670년 2월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jedediah Strong(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Freedom Woodward(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1690년 3월 4일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 Benjamin Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1762년 3월 20일 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 커븐트리에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Strong nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1670, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Jedediah Strong, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Freedom Woodward, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Carpenter em 4 de março de 1690, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1762, em Coventry, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Strong родилась 3 февраля 1670 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Jedediah Strong было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Freedom Woodward, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Carpenter 4 марта 1690 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 20 марта 1762 г. в местности ковентри, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Strong nació el 3 de febrero de 1670, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Jedediah Strong, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Freedom Woodward, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Benjamin Carpenter el 4 de marzo de 1690, en Northampton, Hampshire, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1762, en Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 92 años.
